name: 李家瑜
objective:
本課程提供學生及職前專業人士必備之英語文語言技巧，強調設計與人文專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分並整合英語文之聽說讀寫之能力為未來全球化移動及以英語專業溝通人才培育為目標。
This course aims to provide pre-service design and cultural business students/professionals with the adequate skills of the English language and communicative competence to facilitate their current academic and future career pursuits. Students are encouraged to utilize their domain expertise to participate in professional communication in English. Centered on the training of professional use of the English language, the ESP curriculum as the crux of a highly-integrated work of domain knowledge and the English learning development embodies the indispensable credentials required for a global profession.
schedule:
W1 Class Introduction & Unit 1: Check-up
W2 Unit 1: Check-up
W3 Unit 2: Parts (1)
W4 Unit 2: Parts (1)
W5 Unit 3: Parts (2)
W6 Unit 3: Parts (2)
W7 Unit 4: Movement
W8 Unit 4: Movement
W9 Campus-Wide Exam & Review
W10 Unit 5: Flow
W11 Unit 5: Flow
W12 Unit 6: Materials
W13 Unit 6: Materials
W14 Group Presentation
W15 Group Presentation
W16 Final Oral Exam (National Holiday on Thursday - 12/25)
W17 Final Oral Exam (National Holiday on Thursday – 1/1)
W18 End-of-semester Assignment
scorePolicy:
Attendance 10%
In-Class Works and Quizzes 35%
Group Presentation 15%
Assignment 5%
Final Oral Exam 15%
Campus-wide Exam (會考) 20%
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG8：尊嚴就業與經濟發展（Decent Work and Economic Growth）SDG9：產業創新與基礎設施（Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure）
課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）
